title: Basic JavaScript Error Handling
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Error Handling. Focus on implementing try/catch/finally correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Error Handling
description: Create a function that uses try/catch/finally and Error types (Error, SyntaxError, ReferenceError, etc.) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Error Handling Project
description: Build a small application that applies try/catch/finally, Error types (Error, SyntaxError, ReferenceError, etc.), Custom error classes in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Error Handling
description: The following code has bugs related to try/catch/finally. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Error Handling
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with try/catch/finally and Error types (Error, SyntaxError, ReferenceError, etc.).
